name: text2sql-framework
description: Agent guidance for building and using Text2SQL systems with tool-based schema exploration and scenario feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Build Text-to-SQL agents that explore schemas, test SQL, and improve with scenarios.
interface.longDescription: Use Text2SQL Framework guidance to connect LLM agents to SQLAlchemy databases, let them explore schema with execute_sql, self-correct queries, record traces, and maintain scenarios.md feedback loops.
defaultPrompt: Use Text2SQL Framework guidance for this database agent.
Design a scenarios.md feedback loop for this schema.
Review this text-to-SQL workflow for safety and correctness.
